title: FAIR Vocabulary Declaration Meta-Schema
description: Demonstrates Mechanism 2: declaring a custom $vocabulary in a meta-schema. This file itself is a meta-schema that vocabulary-aware validators can use to understand which FAIR vocabulary keywords are required vs. optional.
$comment: The $vocabulary object above is the key: 'true' means a validator MUST support the vocabulary to process this schema. 'false' means it is optional — validators that don't understand it will silently ignore those keywords.
